dataRules.output: Data is scattered across multiple systems, increasing integration complexity.
Lack of structured digital data will require significant manual preparation.
Missing process documentation may hide edge cases and data anomalies.
Unstructured document processing requires OCR/LLM parsing pipeline.
No digital audit trail exists for the current process — manual data reconstruction needed.

processRules.output: Low process maturity suggests high variability; standardization is required before AI build.
Low frequency limits the ROI and data gathering opportunities.
Heavy dependency on manual judgment increases AI confidence threshold requirements.
No centralized workflow tracking system — process visibility challenge.
Exception handling paths are not documented — edge cases may surface post-deployment.

valueRules.output: Undefined KPIs make it difficult to measure automation success and ROI.
Low process frequency may limit return on investment.
Integration complexity may delay time-to-value and increase implementation cost.
AI accuracy risk — dependent on significant data cleanup before value realization.

feasibilityRules.output: High number of system integrations significantly increases technical risk.
Process requires subjective human judgment — AI confidence thresholds and fallback logic needed.
High exception rate expected from poor data quality — sophisticated fallback logic required.
